lines.text: The final item: 300k Shell Credits. Any takers?
A deal like this doesn't come around very often.
Hey, Sonam, that's one chill friend you brought to the auction. Hasn't even made a single bid yet!
Hey, you. First time here?
I like new faces... How about I give you a “new customer" discount: 280k. How's that sound?
Tsk, what's that supposed to mean? You trying to stir up trouble?
Or... are you trying to lowball me?
You carefully. Anyone who comes here, whether they buy something or not, is going to part with their money—that's the rule.
Well, well, Sonam. That customer of yours has some guts for tipping off the Spacetrek Collective. And all this time I thought you were one of us.
Heh... So it was you.
Get {Male=him;Female=her}! And I want this place cleaned up before they get here!
